title: Never Enough Currency 3
description: Adds A banking system into minecraft with a functional currency
body:
# Welcome to NEC3 the next iteration of Never Enough Currency #

## After a long overdue update and re-write we have brought NEC3 to NeoForge 1.21.1

## Current Version: 2.0.0 ##

This mod allows players to pay each other for items by using a brand new currency MineDollar, this currency is based upon USD. No longer will diamonds or emeralds be the only currencies of minecraft.

Q: How do I get MineDollar.

A: Simple, you will get MineDollar from mob drops (see the mob list below for amounts)

  ---  
Q: How do I pay another player.

A: There are 2 ways. The first way is by handing them the amount, The second way is by using the command /bank pay "Name" "Amount".

  ---  
Q: How do I withdraw money.

A: Use The Command /bank withdraw {Denomination}, You will find a list of coins and notes, just select the coin or note you want.

  ---  
Q: What is the shop.

A: The shop is a server side shop to purchase items, all items and price range can be changed.

  ---  
Q: What is the price range about

A: The price range is similar to a stock market style system where every hour the prices will shuffle within the price range.

  ---  

## Mob Drops ##

| Mob name        |Amount|Item          | Equivalent               |
|-----------------|:-----|:-------------|:-------------------------|
| Magma Cube      | 1 - 4| Penny        | 0.01 - 0.04 MineDollar   |
| Zombie          | 1 - 4| Dime         | 0.10 - 0.40 MineDollar   |
| Creeper         | 1 - 4| Dime         | 0.10 - 0.40 MineDollar   |
| Skeleton        | 1 - 4| Dime         | 0.10 - 0.40 MineDollar   |
| Spider          | 1 - 4| Dime         | 0.10 - 0.40 MineDollar   |
| Enderman        | 1 - 4| Quarter      | 0.25 - 1.00 MineDollar   |
| Cave Spider     | 1 - 4| Quarter      | 0.25 - 1.00 MineDollar   |
| Drowned         | 1 - 4| Quarter      | 0.25 - 1.00 MineDollar   |
| Piglin          | 1 - 4| Quarter      | 0.25 - 1.00 MineDollar   |
| Pillager        | 1 - 4| Quarter      | 0.25 - 1.00 MineDollar   |
| Shulker         | 1 - 4| Quarter      | 0.25 - 1.00 MineDollar   |
| Evoker          | 1 - 4| One          | 1.00 - 4.00 MineDollar   |
| Ghast           | 1 - 4| One          | 1.00 - 4.00 MineDollar   |
| Hoglin          | 1 - 4| One          | 1.00 - 4.00 MineDollar   |
| Vex             | 1 - 4| One          | 1.00 - 4.00 MineDollar   |
| Witch           | 1 - 4| One          | 1.00 - 4.00 MineDollar   |
| Phantom         | 1 - 4| Five         | 5.00 - 15.00 MineDollar  |
| Wither Skeleton | 1 - 4| Five         | 5.00 - 15.00 MineDollar  |
| Piglin Brute    | 1 - 4| Ten          | 10.00 - 40.00 MineDollar |
| Ravager         | 1 - 4| Ten          | 10.00 - 40.00 MineDollar |
| Ender Dragon    | 1 - 4| One Hundred  | 100 - 400 MineDollar     |
| Wither          | 1 - 4| Five Hundred | 500 - 2000 MineDollar    |
| Warden          | 1 - 4| Five Hundred | 500 - 2000 MineDollar    |

  ---  

## Chest Loot ##

| Location         | Chance | Item  | Amount | Equivalent               |
|:-----------------|:-------|:------|:-------|:-------------------------|
| Pillager Outpost | 33%    | Five  | 1 - 4  | 5.00 - 15.00 MineDollar  |
| Woodland Mansion | 33%    | Ten   | 1 - 4  | 10.00 - 40.00 MineDollar |

More chest loot to be added in later versions

  ---
